## 🏆 Review — You've Conquered the Friends & Builders Workshop!

_Congratulations, adventurer! You've completed all three levels and learned core GitHub skills alongside Mona, Ducky, and Copilot!_

<img src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/631758ce-770a-49c3-8dfc-449f01b58a33" alt="Mona, Ducky, and Copilot together in the Friends & Builders workshop" width="500" align="right" />

Here's a recap of your epic journey:

- 🐱‍💻 **Mona's Dev Den** — Created a branch, committed a file, and opened your first Pull Request. You cracked the code!
- 🐥 **Ducky's Deployment Dock** — Built a GitHub Actions CI workflow, watched it run green, and merged your PR like a pro!
- ⚡ **Copilot's AI Forge** — Co-created utility functions with GitHub Copilot, generated tests with Copilot Chat, and shipped polished code!

### What's next?

- 🌱 [Introduction to GitHub](https://github.com/skills/introduction-to-github) — Dive deeper into GitHub fundamentals.
- 🤖 [GitHub Copilot Fundamentals](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/paths/copilot/) — Level up your AI-assisted development skills.
- 🚀 [GitHub Actions](https://github.com/skills/hello-github-actions) — Build more powerful automation workflows.
- 📖 [GitHub Docs](https://docs.github.com) — The ultimate reference for everything GitHub.

> _"Friends build better than they do alone."_ — Mona, Ducky & Copilot 🤝
